member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.Handlers.PostgreSqlHandlers.BulkInsertAsync``1(Npgsql.NpgsqlConnection,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},Gurung.BulkOperations.TableDetails,Gurung.BulkOperations.BulkConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk insert using PostgreSQL's COPY command.

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.Handlers.PostgreSqlHandlers.BulkCopyToTempTableAsync``1(Npgsql.NpgsqlConnection,Npgsql.NpgsqlTransaction,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},Gurung.BulkOperations.TableDetails,Gurung.BulkOperations.BulkConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk copy entities to temp table using COPY command

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.Handlers.PostgreSqlHandlers.CreateTempTableAsync(Npgsql.NpgsqlConnection,Npgsql.NpgsqlTransaction,Gurung.BulkOperations.TableDetails,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a temporary table from the source table structure.

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.Handlers.PostgreSqlHandlers.IsDefaultValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if a value is the default value for its type.

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.Handlers.PostgreSqlHandlers.SqlCommandAsync(Npgsql.NpgsqlConnection,Npgsql.NpgsqlTransaction,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a raw SQL command.

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.Handlers.PostgreSqlHandlers.ExecuteMergeAsync(Npgsql.NpgsqlConnection,Npgsql.NpgsqlTransaction,Gurung.BulkOperations.TableDetails,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the merge operation (InsertOrUpdate) using split queries. Handles records with NULL/default PKs (for INSERT) separately from records with existing PKs (for UPSERT).

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.Handlers.PostgreSqlHandlers.BulkInsertOrUpdateAsync``1(Npgsql.NpgsqlConnection,Npgsql.NpgsqlTransaction,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},Gurung.BulkOperations.TableDetails,Gurung.BulkOperations.BulkConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the complete InsertOrUpdate operation: 1. Creates temp table 2. Copies data to temp table 3. Executes merge (split into UPSERT + INSERT) 4. Drops temp table

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.Handlers.PostgreSqlHandlers.BulkCopyToTempTableWithPKAsync``1(Npgsql.NpgsqlConnection,Npgsql.NpgsqlTransaction,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},Gurung.BulkOperations.TableDetails,Gurung.BulkOperations.BulkConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk copy entities to temp table, including PK columns (even if null/default). This is specifically for InsertOrUpdate operations.

member.name: T:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.QueryBuilder.PostgreQueryBuilder
member.summary: PostgreSQL-specific query builder for bulk operations. Generates optimized queries using COPY, INSERT ON CONFLICT, and temp table strategies.

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.QueryBuilder.PostgreQueryBuilder.CopyCommand(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Generates a COPY command for PostgreSQL's binary import.

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.QueryBuilder.PostgreQueryBuilder.GenerateUpdateQuery(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Generates an UPDATE query using temp table merge strategy. Only updates rows where temp table has non-null primary keys.

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.QueryBuilder.PostgreQueryBuilder.GenerateSplitMergeQueries(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates split merge queries using PostgreSQL's INSERT ... ON CONFLICT. Handles both UPSERT for existing records and INSERT for new records with null/default PKs.

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.QueryBuilder.PostgreQueryBuilder.GetPkNotDefaultConditions(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Helper to build conditions for PKs that are NOT default values. Handles int (!=0), long (!=0), Guid (!=empty), string (!='' and IS NOT NULL)

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.QueryBuilder.PostgreQueryBuilder.GetPkNullOrDefaultConditions(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Helper to build conditions for PKs that ARE null or default values.

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.QueryBuilder.PostgreQueryBuilder.DropTempTableQuery(System.String)
member.summary: Drops a temporary table if it exists

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.QueryBuilder.PostgreQueryBuilder.CreateTempTableQuery(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a temporary table from the source table structure

member.name: T:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.QueryBuilder.MergeQueryPair
member.summary: Represents a pair of queries for split merge operations

member.name: P:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.QueryBuilder.MergeQueryPair.UpsertQuery
member.summary: Query to UPSERT records that have existing PKs (update if exists, insert if not)

member.name: P:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreSql.QueryBuilder.MergeQueryPair.InsertNewQuery
member.summary: Query to INSERT new records that have NULL or default PKs

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreDataHandler.PostgreSql.PostgreSqlDataHandler.BulkInsertAsync``1(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},Gurung.BulkOperations.BulkConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: This method performs a bulk insert operation for a collection of entities into a PostgreSQL database using the provided DbContext.

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreDataHandler.PostgreSql.PostgreSqlDataHandler.BulkUpDateAsync``1(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},Gurung.BulkOperations.BulkConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: This method performs a bulk update operation for a collection of entities in a PostgreSQL database using the provided DbContext.

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreDataHandler.PostgreSql.PostgreSqlDataHandler.BulkInsertOrUpDateAsync``1(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},Gurung.BulkOperations.BulkConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: This method performs a bulk insert or update operation for a collection of entities in a PostgreSQL database using the provided DbContext. Handles both new records (with null/default PKs) and existing records (with valid PKs) in a single operation. Uses a split merge strategy: UPSERT for existing records, INSERT for new records.

member.name: M:Gurung.BulkOperations.PostgreDataHandler.PostgreSql.PostgreSqlDataHandler.ConvertToDataTable``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},Gurung.BulkOperations.TableDetails)
member.summary: Converts a collection of entities to a DataTable
